overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark, abandoned Soviet-style institutional building with peeling paint and debris. The player moves through narrow corridors into a large corner room with windows overlooking a foggy forest, passing a dark standing figure. The atmosphere is horror-themed with high-quality game engine graphics featuring dramatic lighting and environmental storytelling elements like teddy bears on windowsills.

faint light visible through windows at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, narrow corridor of an abandoned building with deteriorating yellow-green walls and debris scattered on the concrete floor. The camera moves forward toward distant windows, passing through doorways in a low-light environment with no other visible characters or movement.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a more defined institutional hallway featuring distinctive red lockers on the left wall and bulletin boards with notices. The corridor continues forward with wooden doors on the right and exposed ceiling pipes, maintaining the abandoned, low-light atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: The player enters a large corner room with multiple tall windows revealing a foggy forest outside, dramatically increasing the ambient light. A dark standing figure is visible near a broken desk in the center of the room. The space contains radiators beneath the windows and scattered debris, creating an eerie abandoned atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: room perimeter near windows with abandoned personal items

events.description: turns toward the windows to examine teddy bears placed on the sill
turns away from windows and moves back toward the room entrance

agents.ego_description: examining the windowsill items and panning around the room before heading back

bare trees and fog visible through the dirty window glass

segments.scene_description: The player explores the perimeter of the large room, focusing on teddy bears placed on the windowsill overlooking the foggy forest. After observing the abandoned items and broken furniture, the camera turns back toward the doorway, moving away from the windows and preparing to exit the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, decaying corridor that eventually opens into a large, light-filled room overlooking a misty wilderness. It begins by pushing through a dark, narrow hallway with deteriorating yellow-green walls and debris-strewn concrete floors. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a more structured institutional wing characterized by red lockers, bulletin boards, and exposed ceiling pipes. The scene then expands as the player enters a spacious corner room where the dim interior light is suddenly replaced by the pale glow of a foggy forest visible through tall windows, revealing a dark standing figure near a broken desk. Finally, the camera drifts along the perimeter to observe teddy bears resting on the windowsills before turning away from the glass and retreating back toward the doorway.
